queue.title: Initial QA — rhp-claude project setup
queue.description: Run /qa-check on orchestrator.js. Verify Barba namespaces, Lenis init, GSAP context cleanup, and reduced-motion guard are all in place before first deploy.

queue.title: Nav compass — rotary switch navigation (reusable 2/3/4 links)
queue.description: Three-way rotary switch with compass dial. Anchor links: Surface=home, Dive=below, Contact=contact. Hover primes dial ~10deg, click rotates + scrolls. Reusable pattern for 2-4 links. Accessible (aria-hidden dial, reduced-motion skip).

queue.title: Hero background — two decorative SVG blob/arch shapes
queue.description: Two overlapping organic SVG shapes layered behind hero text. Purely decorative, absolute positioned, full-width.

queue.title: Hero title — 'Studio Zissou' + tagline with SplitText entrance
queue.description: Character-by-character entrance animation via GSAP SplitText (or SVG path animation if SVG format chosen). Tagline follows after title. Format TBD (text vs SVG for viewport-width scaling).

queue.title: Intro text — right-aligned body paragraphs
queue.description: Two-paragraph intro block, right-aligned. PP Rader Regular 14px, #2A2A2A. Static, no animation.

queue.title: Work clients — CMS list with hover preview images + bracket chars
queue.description: CMS-driven client list. Hover fades in preview image at fixed position. All clients have external URLs with ↗ arrow. Font feature settings for bracket characters. CMS collection: name, preview image, URL, display order.

queue.title: Decorative ovals — breathing gills animation (Ghibli-inspired)
queue.description: Five oval SVGs. Inner SVG flips horizontally (scaleX), cascading right-to-left with stagger, 4s pause, repeat. Ghibli airship breathing gills aesthetic. GSAP timeline.

queue.title: Quality cards — scroll-triggered reveal (Interfaces/Code/Decisions)
queue.description: Three cards with corner pins and dashed connectors. ScrollTrigger-driven reveal: line draws, corners appear, content fades in. Decorative elements, no interaction.

queue.title: Contact CTA — heading + body + scroll anchor (mobile only)
queue.description: 'Let's Talk It Through' heading, body paragraph, 'Get in touch →' anchor link. Link scrolls to form on mobile only (form stacks below on mobile).

queue.title: Contact form — postcard/telegram styled Webflow native form
queue.description: Vintage postcard aesthetic. Italian labels, SZ monogram, Name/Email/Message fields with dashed underlines. Webflow native form submission. Placeholder copy TBD.

queue.title: Footer — © SZ, logo/trumpet, Privacy · Terms
queue.description: Simple flex row: © SZ left, SZ logo/trumpet graphic centre, Privacy · Terms right.
